item.title: Running a Platform Like a Product
item.description: Once your developers are customers, the day-to-day job is mostly communication: surfacing what already exists, giving warning before you change things and showing where the platform is going.

item.title: Conventional Commits to Automated Releases
item.description: How conventional commits drive automated versioning and changelogs with semantic-release.

item.title: Platform as a Product
item.description: Treating internal developers as customers: golden paths, paved roads, and why adoption is the metric that actually matters.

item.title: Releasing Helm Charts
item.description: One chart per repo, locked down with a values schema and released to an OCI registry with semantic-release.

item.title: Versioning Terraform Modules
item.description: Applying release discipline to module tags so consumers can pin versions sanely.
